{
  "judge_id": "demo-judge",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "R1.4", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {"R1.1": 3, "R1.2": 4, "R1.4": 3, "RX.1": 3, "RX.3": 5, "RX.4": 4, "RX.5": 1},
  "rationale": {"R1.1": "Identifies a conceptual issue (overgeneralization of contribution) and proposes a partial fix (softening claims).", "R1.2": "Walks the argument chain, identifying several inconsistencies and proposing fixes.", "R1.4": "Names prior work (constrained reinforcement learning) and articulates a delta, but doesn't map against multiple works.", "RX.1": "Flags uncertainty for some claims (generalizability), but not all.", "RX.3": "Covers exactly the requested dimensions.", "RX.4": "Identifies potential harm (overstated contribution) and proposes mitigations.", "RX.5": "Does not provide traceability for changes."},
  "confidence": {"R1.1": 0.8, "R1.2": 0.9, "R1.4": 0.7, "RX.1": 0.6, "RX.3": 0.9, "RX.4": 0.8, "RX.5": 0.5},
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: Identifies a conceptual issue (overgeneralization of contribution) and proposes a partial fix (softening claims).
rationale.R1.2: Walks the argument chain, identifying several inconsistencies and proposing fixes.
rationale.R1.4: Names prior work (constrained reinforcement learning) and articulates a delta, but doesn't map against multiple works.
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty for some claims (generalizability), but not all.
rationale.RX.4: Identifies potential harm (overstated contribution) and proposes mitigations.
rationale.RX.5: Does not provide traceability for changes.
